# FlagOff

## Tags
unflag, unmark, report, marker, notification, warning, milestone, goal, notice, signal, attention, banner

## Categories
account, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/flag-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FlagOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FlagOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
